subject: Project Report Submission — CS601 Advanced ML
body: Submit your final project report by April 20, 2025. The report should be 15-20 pages and cover your methodology, experiments, and results. Submit via the course portal.

attachment_texts.project_guidelines.docx: Report must include: Abstract (250 words), Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, Experiments, Results, Conclusion. Use IEEE format. Font: Times New Roman 12pt. Submit as PDF.
